message: Hello, I'm willing to bid around 55 for the unit if you are open to selling at that price.
Thanks for reaching out! Unfortunately, 55 is too low for me to consider. My costs are higher, so I'd need a price closer to 85-90 to make this worthwhile. Let's find a mutually beneficial deal.
We were very close in round 1! I'm willing to come down slightly from 75. If you can move your bid up a bit from 70, I think we can reach a deal this round and both benefit.
I can raise my bid to 72 at most. If you lower your ask to 74, we can both make a profit on this trade.
